description_long: This is a tall, corner-shaped wooden cabinet or shelf unit designed to fit snugly into a right-angled corner. The front features three open triangular shelves, each receding in depth as they ascend, providing ample space for storage or display. The bottom section is enclosed by two hinged doors, one of which is partially open, revealing a closed storage compartment. The exterior is finished in a light, natural wood grain, giving it a warm and contemporary appearance. The back and sides are solid panels, with the rear forming a sharp angle to maximize corner placement. There are no visible glass panels or decorative elements, emphasizing a functional and minimalist design.
description: A tall, corner-shaped wooden cabinet with three open triangular shelves and a two-door enclosed compartment at the base, finished in light wood grain.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing three open triangular shelves and two hinged doors at the bottom, one of which is open.
description_view_1: Angled top-down side view highlighting the solid wood side panel and the open door at the base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid, angled back panel designed for corner placement, with no visible openings or features.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view showing the other solid wood side and the open door at the base.
